flavorText: Vengeance paladins pursue sworn foes with ruthless focus and unrelenting punishment.

features.description: Your oath emphasizes Fight the Greater Evil, No Mercy for the Wicked, By Any Means Necessary, and Restitution.
A creature you present your symbol to must make a Wisdom save or become frightened, with speed reduced to 0 for up to 1 minute.
Choose one creature you can see; you gain advantage on attack rolls against it for 1 minute.
When you hit with an opportunity attack, you can move up to half your speed toward the attacker without provoking opportunity attacks.
When your Vow of Enmity target makes an attack, you can use your reaction to make a melee weapon attack against it.
You assume a terrifying angelic form that lets you fly and frighten enemies as divine retribution manifests.

vengeance-tenets.summary: Your oath is about pursuing the guilty without hesitation and ending threats decisively.
vengeance-tenets.description: Vengeance is the relentless hunter version of paladin. Its tenets justify a more aggressive, pursuit-driven playstyle than many holy orders.

vengeance-abjure-enemy.summary: Overwhelm a foe with divine judgment and strip away its ability to act freely.
vengeance-abjure-enemy.description: Abjure Enemy is the subclass’s hard-control oath option. It is strongest when used to pin a priority threat before it can dominate the encounter.

vengeance-vow-of-enmity.summary: Swear yourself against a chosen enemy and gain the accuracy needed to finish the hunt.
vengeance-vow-of-enmity.description: Vow of Enmity is a premier boss-target button. It pushes the subclass toward single-target execution and makes your next several turns much more lethal against the marked foe.

vengeance-relentless-avenger.summary: When a marked foe tries to escape you, your oath helps you stay on top of the chase.
vengeance-relentless-avenger.description: Relentless Avenger supports the subclass fantasy of a divine pursuer who does not let prey disengage or reposition safely.

vengeance-soul-of-vengeance.summary: Your oath gives even more payoff when fighting the one enemy you swore to destroy.
vengeance-soul-of-vengeance.description: Soul of Vengeance deepens the subclass’s single-target obsession and makes its marked duel pattern much harder for an enemy to weather.

vengeance-avenging-angel.summary: Unleash a terrifying avenger form that dominates the battlefield through fear and divine presence.
vengeance-avenging-angel.description: Avenging Angel is the late-game expression of the subclass fantasy: relentless judgment descending from above, impossible to ignore.
